features.description: Add LyricAnnotation type to the Track data model. In lib/types.ts, add a new exported type: LyricAnnotation = { lyricText: string; note: string; sourceUrl?: string; sourceTitle?: string }. Then add an optional 'annotations' field of type LyricAnnotation[] to the existing Track type. DONE: LyricAnnotation type is exported from lib/types.ts, Track type has 'annotations?: LyricAnnotation[]' field. DO NOT TOUCH: Any other types, any component files, lib/albums.ts. VERIFY: pnpm build passes, no type errors.
steps: Add LyricAnnotation type export to lib/types.ts
Add annotations?: LyricAnnotation[] to Track type
pnpm build passes

features.description: Add Google Font Spectral for annotation panels (the 'Lenny newsletter feel'). Using next/font/google, load Spectral with weights 400, 600 and subsets ['latin'], styles ['normal', 'italic']. Export the font variable and add a CSS class 'font-lenny' that applies it. The class should be available globally via the html element's className or via a CSS variable. DONE: A component or element with className including 'font-lenny' renders in Spectral serif. DO NOT TOUCH: existing font usage, global styles beyond adding the new font class, any component files. VERIFY: pnpm build passes. The font-lenny class is available (check layout.tsx or globals.css).
steps: Import Spectral from next/font/google in app/layout.tsx
Configure weights [400, 600], styles ['normal', 'italic'], subsets ['latin']
Add the font's variable class to the html element className
Add a .font-lenny utility class in globals.css that applies the Spectral font-family
pnpm build passes

features.description: Add Genius-style lyric annotations to SyncedLyrics component. Accept a new optional prop 'annotations' (LyricAnnotation[] from lib/types.ts) and 'accentColor' is already a prop. For each lyric line, check if any annotation's lyricText matches (case-insensitive substring match against line.text). Annotated lines get: (1) a subtle dotted underline (border-bottom: 1px dotted) and slightly brighter opacity, (2) a small annotation icon or indicator. On click/tap of an annotated line, toggle an expandable panel directly below it. The panel styling MUST feel like reading Lenny's newsletter: use font-lenny class (Spectral serif), left border (3px solid) in the accentColor, bg-white/5 background, p-4 padding, text-sm leading-relaxed for the note text. Include a source attribution line at the bottom: 'From [sourceTitle]' as a small muted link to sourceUrl if provided. Use framer-motion AnimatePresence for smooth expand/collapse. Only one annotation panel open at a time (clicking another closes the previous). DONE: Annotated lyric lines are visually distinct with dotted underline. Clicking expands a serif-font panel with the annotation. Panel has left accent border and source link. IMPORTANT: the existing lyric click-to-seek behavior should still work — add annotation toggle to a separate tap target (e.g., the annotation indicator icon) OR make the annotation expand on the SECOND tap (first tap seeks). DO NOT TOUCH: lyrics parsing logic, share lyric functionality, audio playback. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Import LyricAnnotation type from lib/types.ts
Add annotations?: LyricAnnotation[] to SyncedLyricsProps interface
Create a helper to match annotations to parsed lyric lines (case-insensitive substring)
Add state for which annotation index is currently expanded (null = none)
Render annotated lines with dotted underline styling and a small indicator icon
Add a clickable annotation indicator (separate from the seek button) that toggles the panel
Render the expandable annotation panel with font-lenny class, accent left border, source link
Use framer-motion AnimatePresence for smooth open/close
Ensure only one panel open at a time
pnpm build passes

features.description: Wire annotations data from track to SyncedLyrics in TrackPageClient. Pass track.annotations to the SyncedLyrics component. The accentColor prop is already passed. This should be backwards-compatible: if track.annotations is undefined or empty, SyncedLyrics renders exactly as before. DONE: SyncedLyrics receives annotations prop from track data. DO NOT TOUCH: audio player, layout, other sections of track page. VERIFY: pnpm build passes. Track pages render without errors (annotations is undefined for all current tracks, so no visual change yet).
steps: In TrackPageClient.tsx, add annotations={track.annotations} prop to the SyncedLyrics component
pnpm build passes

features.description: Add sample annotations to one track for testing. Pick the track 'do-things-that-dont-scale' in lib/albums.ts (the first track in foundersTracks array). Add an annotations array with exactly 4 annotations connecting specific lyrics to Lenny insights. Use these annotations: (1) lyricText: 'Knocked on every door from dusk to dawn', note: 'Brian Chesky told Lenny he flew to New York and personally knocked on hosts\' doors to photograph their apartments. This hands-on approach tripled conversion rates on listings with professional photos.', sourceTitle: 'Brian Chesky on Airbnb\'s early days', sourceUrl: 'https://www.lennyspodcast.com/brian-cheskys-new-playbook/'. (2) lyricText: 'Stripe boys at the laptop, wouldn\'t leave', note: 'The Collison brothers famously wouldn\'t take "I\'ll sign up later" for an answer. They\'d ask "can I see your laptop?" and install Stripe right there. Lenny calls this the gold standard of unscalable acquisition.', sourceTitle: 'How the biggest companies got their first users', sourceUrl: ''. (3) lyricText: 'A hundred users loved by hand, not code', note: 'Paul Graham\'s famous essay argues you need to "recruit users one at a time" and make each one love you before thinking about growth. Lenny featured this as the #1 lesson across 20+ first-user stories.', sourceTitle: 'Do Things That Don\'t Scale', sourceUrl: 'https://paulgraham.com/ds.html'. (4) lyricText: 'Every great company started small', note: 'Lenny\'s research across Airbnb, DoorDash, Tinder, Stripe, and Uber found the same pattern: the founders who won were the ones willing to do the work that wouldn\'t scale, personally serving early users until they figured out what people really wanted.', sourceTitle: 'How the biggest companies got their first users', sourceUrl: ''. DONE: The do-things-that-dont-scale track has 4 annotations in lib/albums.ts. DO NOT TOUCH: any other tracks, any component files. VERIFY: pnpm build passes, no type errors on the annotations array.
steps: Find the do-things-that-dont-scale track object in lib/albums.ts
Add the annotations array with the 4 specified annotations after the existing fields
pnpm build passes

features.description: Build a /topics browse page showing all unique tags as a clickable grid. Create app/topics/page.tsx. Import getAllTracks from lib/tracks. Collect all unique tags from all non-locked tracks (track.tags array). Sort alphabetically. Display as a grid of pill-shaped buttons (similar to the existing tag styling on track pages but larger and clickable). Each pill links to /topics/[tag]. Page has a header 'Browse by Topic' and a back link to home. Use the app's existing dark theme styling. Layout: responsive grid, 2 cols on mobile, 3-4 on desktop. DONE: /topics page renders showing all tags as clickable pills linking to /topics/[tag]. DO NOT TOUCH: lib/albums.ts, existing components, other pages. VERIFY: pnpm build passes. The /topics route exists in the build output.
steps: Create app/topics/page.tsx
Import getAllTracks, collect unique tags from non-locked tracks
Sort tags alphabetically
Render responsive grid of pill links to /topics/[tag]
Add page header and back-to-home link
pnpm build passes

features.description: Build a /topics/[tag] page showing all tracks matching a tag. Create app/topics/[tag]/page.tsx. Import getAllTracks from lib/tracks and getAllAlbums. Filter tracks where track.tags includes the tag parameter (case-insensitive). For each matching track, display: cover thumbnail (48x48), track title (links to /track/[slug]), album name, genre, duration. Use a vertical list layout. Page header shows the tag name. Include a back link to /topics. If no tracks match, show 'No tracks found for this topic.' Use generateStaticParams to pre-render all tag pages by collecting unique tags from all tracks. DONE: Visiting /topics/hustle shows all tracks tagged 'hustle' with links to each track. DO NOT TOUCH: lib/albums.ts, existing components, other pages. VERIFY: pnpm build passes. The /topics/[tag] routes exist in build output.
steps: Create app/topics/[tag]/page.tsx
Import getAllTracks and filter by tag parameter
Display matching tracks as a list with thumbnail, title link, album, genre, duration
Add generateStaticParams for all unique tags
Add page header with tag name and back link to /topics
Handle empty state
pnpm build passes

features.description: Make tags clickable on track pages. In TrackPageClient.tsx, find the section that renders track.tags as span elements (around line 193-203). Wrap each tag span in a Next.js Link component pointing to /topics/[tag]. Keep the existing visual styling (pill shape, border, muted text) but add hover:text-foreground and hover:border-foreground/40 transitions so they look interactive. DONE: Tags on track pages are clickable links to /topics/[tag] with hover feedback. DO NOT TOUCH: audio player, lyrics, other sections. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Import Link from next/link in TrackPageClient.tsx (already imported)
Wrap each tag span in <Link href={`/topics/${tag}`}>
Add hover styles for interactivity feedback
pnpm build passes

features.description: Add a 'Browse by Topic' link to the homepage. In app/page.tsx, add a small text link below the album grid section (after the albums map) that reads 'Browse by Topic →' and links to /topics. Style it as a centered, muted text link with hover effect: text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors. Add some top margin (mt-6) to separate from the album grid. DONE: Homepage has a visible 'Browse by Topic →' link that navigates to /topics. DO NOT TOUCH: hero section, album grid layout, email signup, footer. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add a Link component after the album grid in app/page.tsx
Style as centered muted text with hover effect
pnpm build passes
